name: graphql-codegen
description: GraphQL Code Generator and CLI tools for schema management

subcommands.name: generate
subcommands.description: Generate code from GraphQL schema and operations

subcommands.name: get-schema
subcommands.description: Download and save GraphQL schema from endpoint

subcommands.name: inspect
subcommands.description: Inspect a GraphQL schema and display type information

subcommands.name: diff
subcommands.description: Compare two GraphQL schemas for breaking changes

globalOptions.name: --config
globalOptions.description: Path to codegen config file (default: codegen.ts)
